title: CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT - 211info
text: MIRASOL FAMILY HEALTH CENTER CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education and tools to empower participants to better manage their condition and lead healthier lives. Topics include nutrition, exercise, and communication. 589 NW 11th Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: YVFWC Patients Hours: Monday-Friday 6pm-8:30pm Email (541) 567-1717 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 567-1717 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Chronic Disease Self Management Programs Nutrition Education * Diabetes Nutrition Education * People with Chronic Illnesses Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OUTREACH HUMAN REPRODUCTION - COMMUNITY HEALTH SERVICES OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
